ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, ETF) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry within the sector */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was initially listed */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp to track the last update of the stock's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the exchange */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp to track the last update of the exchange's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the price record belongs */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price before the market opens */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* Price after the market closes */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp to track the last update of the price record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the volume record belongs */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the volume record */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "pre_market_volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume before the market opens */,
  "after_market_volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume after the market closes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp to track the last update of the volume record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volumes_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the return record belongs */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the return record */,
  "return_1day" REAL /* 1-day price return of the stock */,
  "return_5days" REAL /* 5-day price return of the stock */,
  "return_22days" REAL /* 22-day price return of the stock */,
  "return_66days" REAL /* 66-day price return of the stock */,
  "return_132days" REAL /* 132-day price return of the stock */,
  "return_1year" REAL /* 1-year price return of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp to track the last update of the return record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_returns_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (active, inactive, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the permission belongs */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the permission is granted */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "permission_group" TEXT /* Permission group to which the user belongs */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
